message:
feat(command,config,store): implement real CONFIG GET/SET with store params, fix GETSET TTL semantics

Replace CONFIG GET stub with real parameter resolution (static defaults +
dynamic store params with glob matching). Implement CONFIG SET for encoding
thresholds and maxmemory-policy. Fix GETSET to clear TTL per Redis semantics.
Remove spurious TLS connection-type configure violation check. Add conformance
fixtures for Lua CONFIG access.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -3456,6 +3456,97 @@
         "kind": "integer",
         "value": 1
       }
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "eval_redis_call_config_get_maxmemory_policy",
+      "now_ms": 0,
+      "argv": [
+        "EVAL",
+        "local result = redis.call('CONFIG', 'GET', 'maxmemory-policy') if #result == 2 and result[1] == 'maxmemory-policy' then return result[2] end return 'EMPTY'",
+        "0"
+      ],
+      "expect": {
+        "kind": "bulk",
+        "value": "noeviction"
+      }
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "eval_redis_call_config_get_hash_max_listpack_entries",
+      "now_ms": 0,
+      "argv": [
+        "EVAL",
+        "local result = redis.call('CONFIG', 'GET', 'hash-max-listpack-entries') if #result == 2 then return result[2] end return 'EMPTY'",
+        "0"
+      ],
+      "expect": {
+        "kind": "bulk",
+        "value": "128"
+      }
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "eval_redis_call_config_get_nonexistent_returns_empty",
+      "now_ms": 0,
+      "argv": [
+        "EVAL",
+        "local result = redis.call('CONFIG', 'GET', 'nonexistent-param') return #result",
+        "0"
+      ],
+      "expect": {
+        "kind": "integer",
+        "value": 0
+      }
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "eval_redis_call_config_set_and_get_encoding_threshold",
+      "now_ms": 0,
+      "argv": [
+        "EVAL",
+        "redis.call('CONFIG', 'SET', 'hash-max-listpack-entries', '256') local r = redis.call('CONFIG', 'GET', 'hash-max-listpack-entries') return r[2]",
+        "0"
+      ],
+      "expect": {
+        "kind": "bulk",
+        "value": "256"
+      }
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "eval_redis_call_config_get_databases_static",
+      "now_ms": 0,
+      "argv": [
+        "EVAL",
+        "local r = redis.call('CONFIG', 'GET', 'databases') if #r == 2 then return r[2] end return 'EMPTY'",
+        "0"
+      ],
+      "expect": {
+        "kind": "bulk",
+        "value": "16"
+      }
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "eval_redis_call_config_get_appendfsync_static",
+      "now_ms": 0,
+      "argv": [
+        "EVAL",
+        "local r = redis.call('CONFIG', 'GET', 'appendfsync') if #r == 2 then return r[2] end return 'EMPTY'",
+        "0"
+      ],
+      "expect": {
+        "kind": "bulk",
+        "value": "everysec"
+      }
+    },
+    {
+      "name": "eval_redis_call_config_get_wildcard_pattern",
+      "now_ms": 0,
+      "argv": [
+        "EVAL",
+        "local r = redis.call('CONFIG', 'GET', 'slowlog-*') return #r",
+        "0"
+      ],
+      "expect": {
+        "kind": "integer",
+        "value": 4
+      }
     }
   ]
 }
